generation_config.note: RTL generated single-pass, no retries, no post-hoc fixes. Each module written once from its prompt spec alone, without consulting the paired testbench.
generation_config.system_prompt: You are an expert Verilog RTL designer. Given a module specification, write a single synthesizable Verilog module implementing exactly the described interface and behavior. Output only the Verilog module code.

synth_target: generic (no specific FPGA/ASIC cell library; synth -top <module> for synthesizability + warnings only)
